game_info.title: Super Plumber Run
game_info.concept:
A new kind of Mario game that you can play with one hand.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/super-mario-run/id1145275343

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

A new kind of Mario game that you can play with one hand.

You control Mario by tapping as he constantly runs forward. You time your taps to pull off stylish jumps, midair spins, and wall jumps to gather coins and reach the goal!

Super Mario Run can be downloaded for free and after you purchase the game, you will be able to play all the modes with no additional payment required. You can try out all four modes before purchase: World Tour, Toad Rally, Remix 10, and Kingdom Builder.

■World Tour
Run and jump with style to rescue Princess Peach from Bowser’s clutches! 
Travel through plains, caverns, ghost houses, airships, castles, and more.

Clear the 24 exciting courses to rescue Princess Peach from Bowser, waiting in his castle at the end. There are many ways to enjoy the courses, such as collecting the 3 different types of colored coins or by competing for the highest score against your friends. You can try courses 1-1 to 1-4 for free.

After rescuing Princess Peach, a nine-course special world, World Star, will appear.

■Remix 10
Some of the shortest Super Mario Run courses you'll ever play!
This mode is Super Mario Run in bite-sized bursts! You'll play through 10 short courses one after the other, with the courses changing each time you play. Daisy is lost somewhere in Remix 10, so try to clear as many courses as you can to find her!

■Toad Rally
Show off Mario’s stylish moves, compete against your friends, and challenge people from all over the world.

In this challenge mode, the competition differs each time you play.
Compete against the stylish moves of other players for the highest score as you gather coins and get cheered on by a crowd of Toads. Fill the gauge with stylish moves to enter Coin Rush Mode to get more coins. If you win the rally, the cheering Toads will come live in your kingdom, and your kingdom will grow. 

■Kingdom Builder
Gather coins and Toads to build your very own kingdom.

Combine different buildings and decorations to create your own unique kingdom. There are over 100 kinds of items in Kingdom Builder mode. If you get more Toads in Toad Rally, the number of buildings and decorations available will increase. With the help of the friendly Toads you can gradually build up your kingdom.

■What You Can Do After Purchasing All Worlds

・ All courses in World Tour are playable
Why not try out the bigger challenges and thrills available in all courses?

・ Easier to get Rally Tickets
It's easier to get Rally Tickets that are needed to play Remix 10 and Toad Rally. You can collect them in Kingdom Builder through Bonus Game Houses and ? Blocks, by collecting colored coins in World Tour, and more.

・ More playable characters
If you rescue Princess Peach by completing course 6-4 and build homes for Luigi, Yoshi, and Toadette in Kingdom Builder mode, you can get them to join your adventures as playable characters. They play differently than Mario, so why not put their special characteristics to good use in World Tour and Toad Rally?

・ More courses in Toad Rally
The types of courses available in Toad Rally will increase to seven different types of courses, expanding the fun! Along with the new additions, Purple and Yellow Toads may also come to cheer for you.

・ More buildings and decorations in Kingdom Builder
The types of buildings available will increase, so you'll be able to make your kingdom even more lively. You can also place Rainbow Bridges to expand your kingdom.

・ Play Remix 10 without having to wait
You can play Remix 10 continuously, without having to wait between each game.

*Internet connectivity required to play. Data charges may apply. May contain advertisements.
game_info.description: "Super Plumber Run" is a fast-paced auto-runner platformer where you control a heroic plumber dashing through a perilous kingdom. Your character runs automatically; your job is to time your jumps, perform mid-air spins, and wall-kick your way to the goal castle. Collect coins, stomp on enemies, and avoid falling into pits. Use your reflexes to navigate procedurally generated levels filled with pipes, blocks, and goombas!
game_info.controls:
- Space / Up Arrow: Jump (Hold to jump higher)
- Z: Mid-air Spin (Stalls fall, adds distance)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify that the "Smart Runner" AI can successfully navigate the first level segment by avoiding pits and enemies.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The AI analyzes the upcoming terrain grid. If a pit or enemy is detected within a specific forward range, it triggers a jump action. It holds the jump button based on the gap width.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player character travels at least 1000 pixels distance without dying, demonstrating basic obstacle avoidance and physics stability.

TEST_2.test_description: Stress test the physics engine and collision system with random inputs.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller sends random inputs (Jump, Spin, None) at random intervals to simulate erratic player behavior.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game runs for 30 seconds without crashing, freezing, or throwing console errors, regardless of whether the player wins or dies.
TEST_2.description: Stress test the physics engine and collision system with random inputs.

TEST_2.expected: The game runs for 30 seconds without crashing, freezing, or throwing console errors, regardless of whether the player wins or dies.

TEST_3.test_description: Verify wall interaction and wall jump mechanics.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The AI specifically looks for tall vertical walls and attempts to jump against them, checking if the state transitions to 'WALL_SLIDE' and if a subsequent jump executes a wall kick.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player successfully enters the wall slide state and performs a wall jump, gaining height rather than just stopping.
TEST_3.description: Verify wall interaction and wall jump mechanics.
TEST_3.strategy: The AI specifically looks for tall vertical walls and attempts to jump against them, checking if the state transitions to 'WALL_SLIDE' and if a subsequent jump executes a wall kick.
TEST_3.expected: The player successfully enters the wall slide state and performs a wall jump, gaining height rather than just stopping.

TEST_4.test_description: Test collectible interactions and score updating.
TEST_4.strategy_description: The AI runs and jumps to intersect with Coin entities known to be in the path.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: When the player's bounding box intersects a Coin, the Coin is removed from the entity list, and the score increases by the coin's value.
TEST_4.description: Test collectible interactions and score updating.
TEST_4.strategy: The AI runs and jumps to intersect with Coin entities known to be in the path.
TEST_4.expected: When the player's bounding box intersects a Coin, the Coin is removed from the entity list, and the score increases by the coin's value.

TEST_5.test_description: Validate enemy collision logic (Stomp vs Damage).
TEST_5.strategy_description: The AI attempts to land on top of an enemy entity (Goomba) versus running into it from the side.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Landing on top triggers the enemy death and a small player bounce. Running into the side reduces player health/state.
TEST_5.description: Validate enemy collision logic (Stomp vs Damage).
TEST_5.strategy: The AI attempts to land on top of an enemy entity (Goomba) versus running into it from the side.
TEST_5.expected: Landing on top triggers the enemy death and a small player bounce. Running into the side reduces player health/state.

TEST_6.test_description: Verify game loop state transitions (Start -> Playing -> Game Over -> Start).
TEST_6.strategy_description: The test script forces a death event, checks for the GAME_OVER phase, then sends the restart input (R), and checks for the START phase.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: The `gameState.gamePhase` variable transitions correctly through the sequence without getting stuck in an invalid state.
TEST_6.description: Verify game loop state transitions (Start -> Playing -> Game Over -> Start).
TEST_6.strategy: The test script forces a death event, checks for the GAME_OVER phase, then sends the restart input (R), and checks for the START phase.
TEST_6.expected: The `gameState.gamePhase` variable transitions correctly through the sequence without getting stuck in an invalid state.
